commands_run: for f in web/messages/*.json web/content/presence-walk/*.json; do jq empty "$f" || exit 1; done
git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main
failure_reason: The home living-lineage presences were still a hardcoded page array despite force-dynamic rendering. This task moves the card order, images, trace labels, trace hrefs, metrics, sources, and explanations into presence-walk data; adds a server projection helper; adds PORTAL as a presence-walk node; and renders the card image/profile separately from the trace link. The first test run found missing fresh-worktree dependencies, resolved by npm ci. The first build found a TypeScript narrowing issue in the projection helper, resolved with an explicit loop and source visual image helper. The first worktree PR guard saw a transient local API matrix timing miss; the direct verifier rerun passed with no failures, and the rerun PR guard returned ready_for_push=True.

commands: for f in web/messages/*.json web/content/presence-walk/*.json; do jq empty "$f" || exit 1; done
git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main
